headings: 4. What is the reporting timeline for Public Housing Authorities and other recipients of public housing financial assistance?
text: 6/30/21, New Reporting Period Begins = 7/1/21. 6/30/21, New Reporting Period Ends = 6/30/22. 9/30/21, New Reporting Period Begins = 10/1/21. 9/30/21, New Reporting Period Ends = 9/30/22. 12/31/21, New Reporting Period Begins = 1/1/22. 12/31/21, New Reporting Period Ends = 12/13/22. 3/31/22, New Reporting Period Begins = 4/1/22. 3/31/22, New Reporting Period Ends = 3/31/23
